sections.paragraph:
Original: קבל

Transliteration: qâbal

Phonetic: kaw-bal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to take, receive, be before
    1. (Piel)
      1. to take, choose, receive
      2. to accept
      3. to accept, assume
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to show oppositeness
      2. to correspond, receive one to the other

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1980

Part(s) of speech: Verb
